metadata.description: Dense temporal chunks for ITS collision clip 5

chunks.description: Traffic flows normally on a multi-lane road. A white sedan travels in lane 5 (outer lane), while a gray sedan moves in lane 3 (middle lane).
The gray sedan initiates a left turn from the middle lane, crossing into the path of the white sedan. A side-impact collision occurs between 3.0 and 3.5 seconds.
The white sedan is deflected off the roadway and crosses the curb, striking a mature tree on the sidewalk.
The white sedan remains stalled against the tree on the sidewalk, disabled. The gray sedan continues driving forward and exits the camera's field of view without stopping.
